meaning: adj.被除去脚镣的,无拘无束的
examples: This unfettered future was the promise of my time and place.
But eventually competition from unfettered rivals will tell.
They ensure that no one, myself included, has unfettered power.
This lightness began to buoy me and urge me, unfettered, along the highways of southwestern France.
With his unfettered wavy white curls and unshaven jowls he fittingly resembles a sea captain off-duty.
